news.headline: Frontline plc will release Q4 2024 results on Feb 28, with a webcast and conference call at 3:00 p.m. CET/9:00 a.m. EST.
news.summary: Frontline plc is set to announce its preliminary Q4 2024 results on Friday, February 28, 2025. A webcast and conference call are scheduled for 3:00 p.m. CET (9:00 a.m. ET). Interested parties can access the results presentation for download on the Investor Relations page at www.frontlineplc.cy before the conference call.

Funds stolen from Bybit may go through crypto mixers next. The Lazarus Group faces challenges due to high volume.
news.summary: The Lazarus Group, known for their previous tactics, may utilize mixers to hide the stolen funds. However, the large number of stolen assets could make this process more difficult for them.

China 10-year government bond futures drop 0.3% to 107.930
New crypto IP surges 140%, reaching $7.11 with a billion-dollar valuation in just 10 days, aiding creators monetize IP assets.
news.summary: Last week, the cryptocurrency market faced challenges, but some lesser-known coins saw significant growth. The native token of Layer-1 blockchain Story, IP, surged by 138%, reaching a peak value of $7.11 and achieving a billion-dollar valuation just 10 days after its launch. IP is utilized for transaction fees on the blockchain project, which aids creators in registering, licensing, and monetizing their intellectual property assets. In comparison, S, the native token of the fast blockchain platform Sonic, trailed behind IP. For more information, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tune in to Insight with Haslinda Amin on Feb 24, 2024, for the latest updates.
Egg prices soar to $4.95/dozen as 17.2M hens die from bird flu, prompting alternative food suggestions and concerns over food inflation.
news.summary: Economic commentator Noah Smith triggered discussion on food affordability, ridiculing alternatives to eggs as prices surge. Responding to Fox News' suggestions of chickpeas and bananas as egg substitutes, Smith questioned the idea amidst record-high egg prices of $4.95 per dozen in January. The spike followed a bird flu outbreak that wiped out 17.2 million hens in Nov-Dec, leading to a projected 20.3% price increase through 2025. Brian Albrecht linked the surge to supply disruption. Retailers face shortages and consumer backlash amid concerns of food inflation. (Words: 94)

Indegene: GenAI platform Cortex specialized for life sciences
Raydium Token drops by 22% amid Pump.Fun's rumored market maker launch, threatening its position.
news.summary: According to a source, Pump.Fun is in the process of creating its own automated market maker, potentially posing a threat to Raydium's current stronghold in the market.

news.headline: Silver One reports final drill results from Phoenix Silver Project in Arizona, with silver-copper bearing structure identified.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 24, 2025, Silver One Resources Inc. released findings from the 2024 diamond drill program conducted in the 417 area of its Phoenix Silver project. The company, listed on TSXV as SVE, OTCQX as SLVRF, and FSE as BRK1, shared the analytical results from the samples collected during the program.

news.headline: Trump's approach towards China may be more amicable than anticipated, according to a report by Bloomberg.
Montana is the latest state to reject Bitcoin reserve proposals, following North Dakota, Wyoming, and Pennsylvania.
news.summary: Montana has joined North Dakota, Wyoming, and Pennsylvania in rejecting proposals to include Bitcoin in state reserves. This decision comes as a significant development, considering that these four states collectively hold over $310 billion in reserves. The move highlights a growing trend among states to steer clear of incorporating the cryptocurrency into their financial reserves.

Ki Young Ju describes memecoins as symbols of the collective subconscious. Debate grows on social tokens after Libra token failure backed by Argentine President Javier Milei.
news.summary: The ongoing discussion around memecoins and social tokens persists after the collapse of Libra token, which was endorsed by Argentine President Javier Milei. The incident has fueled further scrutiny, with many questioning the viability of such tokens. This event has sparked debates within the cryptocurrency community, with the Libra token's failure highlighting concerns regarding the regulation and stability of these digital assets. As a result, there is increased caution among investors, with a noticeable decline in interest and investments in memecoins and social tokens. This development signifies a turning point in the market, with more attention being paid to the potential risks and uncertainties associated with these emerging forms of digital currency.

Michael Saylor hints at continuing Bitcoin buying spree as company moves ahead with purchasing more BTC as part of its 21/21 plan post $2B note offering.
news.summary: The company is currently advancing with its plan to acquire more BTC through its 21/21 initiative after a recent $2 billion convertible note offering.

news.headline: Hong Kong investment firm increases Bitcoin holdings, buying additional 7 BTC after initial purchase caused shares to spike.
news.summary: The stocks of HK Asia Holdings Limited saw a significant increase, nearly doubling in value, following its initial purchase of Bitcoin a week ago. The investment firm has recently acquired an additional 7 BTC, further boosting its cryptocurrency holdings.

news.headline: SUNMI launched V3 Family at EuroCIS 2025 in Germany, unveiling 3rd Gen flagship.
news.summary: In the retail technology exhibition in Düsseldorf, Germany, from February 18-20, 2025, SUNMI introduced its latest Android flagship, the third-generation V3 Family. This launch marks a global debut for the product line.

news.headline: Kanye West deletes X posts, unfollows CZ, confusing crypto community with potential meme coin project.
news.summary: Renowned rapper Ye, formerly Kanye West, caused confusion in the cryptocurrency community with his unpredictable actions on social media regarding his meme coin project. In a post on Sunday, Ye mentioned the necessity of having his own blockchain, fueling rumors about the imminent launch of his official cryptocurrency. Additionally, Ye shared a series of posts from Changpeng Zhao over the weekend, hinting at the possibility of his new meme coin being linked to the BNB Chain. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Private equity firm KKR set to acquire controlling interest in Indian healthcare company HCG for $400M.
Wego partners with Jordan Tourism Board to promote Jordan's attractions. #1 travel app in MENA.
news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, on February 24th, 2025, Wego, the top travel app and the biggest online travel marketplace in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA), has revealed an exciting strategic alliance with the Jordan Tourism Board. This partnership aims to highlight the beauty and attractions of Jordan and enhance the tourism sector. The Jordan Tourism Board, known for promoting the country's tourism, has joined hands with Wego to tap into its wide user base and extensive reach. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards boosting tourism in Jordan and leveraging Wego's position as the leading platform in the MENA region.

news.headline: Dan Bongino, a content creator, appointed as Deputy Director of the FBI in the Trump Administration.
news.summary: A statement was released by Rumble (NASDAQ:RUM) on Feb. 23, 2025, in Longboat Key, Fla., announcing the appointment of content creator Dan Bongino as Deputy Director of the FBI in the Trump Administration. The statement was issued by CEO and Chairman Chris Pavlovski. Rumble is a video-sharing platform and cloud services provider.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency scammers are exploiting AI bots, using fake tokens with backdoors, hurting automated traders.
news.summary: Criminals are changing tactics in the AI bot battle, utilizing counterfeit tokens with concealed vulnerabilities to take advantage of the unregulated nature of the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Euro strengthens as German conservatives win election on 2/21/25.
news.summary: Euro made significant gains in the market following an election win by German conservatives. The currency surged by a notable percentage, reflecting investor confidence in the outcome. The news comes from Bloomberg's Asia Trade report dated 2/21/25.

news.headline: Bybit CEO claims to have ‘fully closed the ETH gap’ following $1.4B Lazarus hack, buying $742M of Ether overnight.
news.summary: Shortly after the news broke that Bybit had acquired $742 million worth of Ether between February 22 and 23, a statement was issued by the company.

news.headline: 44% of US Bitcoin ETF purchases are for long-term holding, per 10x Research. Markus Thielen suggests long-term demand may be lower than media suggests.
news.summary: Markus Thielen from 10x Research suggests that the interest in Bitcoin as a long-term investment may not be as large as reported in the media.

news.headline: Bybit CEO confirms closing ETH gap post $1.4B hack; $742M ETH purchased Feb. 22-23: Lookonchain.
news.summary: Shortly after a report from Lookonchain disclosed that Bybit had purchased approximately $742 million worth of Ether within a span of just two days on February 22 and 23, the statement was made public.

news.headline: Faraday Future launches FF Global AI Innovation Competition for shaping intelligent mobility solutions. (80)
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIE) has announced the start of their FF Global AI Innovation Competition. The competition is open to all individuals interested in AI technology to revolutionize intelligent mobility. Faraday Future, a California-based global company, is leading the way in AI-powered automotive technology. The initiative aims to redefine the future of intelligent mobility through innovative AI-driven solutions.

news.headline: Trump, Macron to participate in a G7 leader summit call 8am ET Monday
Trump to hold a press conference with Macron at 2pm ET on Monday
Bybit recovers from crypto heist, freezes $42.89M of stolen funds, secures $1.23B in ETH with help from various parties.
news.summary: Bybit managed to freeze $42.89 million of the stolen funds within a day following the massive $1.4 billion hack incident. This development came after hackers illicitly obtained over $1.4 billion worth of Ethereum and related tokens. The successful freezing of the funds was achieved through a joint endeavor involving various parties such as Tether, Circle, Avalanche ecosystem, and Bitget. The involvement of stablecoin issuers like Tether and entities from the cryptocurrency exchange Bitget played a crucial role in this operation. The coordinated effort effectively prevented the hackers from moving the frozen funds, significantly boosting Bybit's reserve security in the aftermath of the cyber attack.

news.headline: Bybit invests $1M in EthicHub via BGA to drive agricultural finance for global farming communities. World's 2nd largest exchange.
news.summary: In Dubai on February 23, 2025, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, revealed its $1 million impact investment in EthicHub via the Blockchain for Good Alliance (BGA). This investment marks a significant step in Bybit's commitment to promoting positive blockchain applications.

news.headline: china offshore yuan strengthens to 7.2264 per dollar, highest level since November 19, 2024
China's onshore yuan rises to 7.2278 per dollar, strongest level since November 29, 2024
MGI Tech partners with Oncoclínicas&Co in São Paulo to advance genomic innovation in oncological health.
news.summary: An agreement signed on February 23, 2025, in São Paulo aims to enhance access to advanced genomic technologies and enhance diagnostic accuracy. MGI Tech Co., Ltd. ("MGI"), dedicated to developing key tools in the life sciences sector, is involved in this initiative. The agreement is set to significantly impact the industry and facilitate the adoption of groundbreaking genomic solutions. This collaboration is expected to benefit numerous individuals and organizations, unlocking the potential of cutting-edge technologies in the field. The agreement is part of efforts to advance research and innovation, potentially improving outcomes for patients and researchers alike.

Owens Corning expected to report earnings of $2.90 per share on revenue of $2.77 billion; Domino's Pizza also expected to release quarterly earnings.
news.summary: US stock futures are showing mixed trading activity on Monday. Investors may keep an eye on Owens Corning, with expectations for quarterly earnings of $2.90 per share on revenue of $2.77 billion. Owens Corning shares saw a slight increase of 0.01% in after-hours trading, reaching $165.47. Meanwhile, analysts are anticipating Domino's Pizza Inc. to announce their quarterly earnings soon. For more information on this news, visit a financial news website.

news.headline: LAGOS Jewelry stunned at the 31st SAG Awards with diamond-encrusted pieces, worn by Danielle Deadwyler, Luke Newton, and Lilly Singh.
news.summary: The 31st Annual Screen Actors Guild Awards in Los Angeles on Feb. 23, 2025 saw LAGOS, a renowned fine jewelry brand celebrated for its distinctive Caviar designs, make a statement on the navy carpet. Popular actors like Danielle Deadwyler, Luke Newton, and Lilly Singh shone in stunning LAGOS pieces featuring diamond embellishments, captivating the audience with their elegance and style.

news.headline: OKX Ventures founder Jeff Ren advises crypto startups to blend strong tech with adaptability to secure VC funding.
news.summary: Jeff Ren, the founder of OKX Ventures, highlighted to Cointelegraph that crypto startups deemed worthy of funding are those that possess a robust technological foundation and demonstrate adaptability in response to market changes.

news.headline: Delta introduces collaborative robots and a 240kW DC fast EV charger at ELECRAMA 2025. Leading innovation in smart manufacturing.
news.summary: Delta, a renowned global provider of IoT-based smart green solutions and a leader in power management, unveiled a cutting-edge 240kW DC fast EV charger at a recent showcase. This innovative technology aims to promote e-mobility in India's sustainable cities. The announcement was made in Taipei on February 23, 2025.
